steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The phrase "with an audience beyond Bolivia" tells us the blank describes María making her work available to people outside her home country. The verb must mean presenting or distributing her work to a wider audience.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘share’: to share means to present or make available to others. "Share her work with an audience beyond Bolivia" correctly captures reaching a global readership. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘split’: to split means to divide into parts, which doesn't fit the idea of making work accessible to more people. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘challenge’: to challenge implies confrontation or competition, not outreach to an audience. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘examine’: to examine means to inspect or analyze, which describes María studying her own work rather than distributing it. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
